name: GSTR-2B Mismatch Found
subject: GSTR-2B Mismatch Alert - {{ doc.filing_period }}
message:
🔍 GSTR-2B Mismatch Detected

Dear Shop Owner,

We've detected mismatches between your purchase records and the vendor-uploaded data in GSTR-2B for {{ doc.filing_period }}.

Affected: Invoices where vendor GSTR-2B data does not match your books.

Why this matters: Mismatches can lead to Input Tax Credit (ITC) rejection, increasing your tax liability.

Recommended action:

  1. Open the GSTR-2B Mismatch Summary report
  2. Contact affected vendors to verify their filings
  3. Reconcile differences before filing date

View Mismatch Summary Report →
